_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Identify targets of opportunity in order to influence operational planning.
reference_document_element_description: Manage operational budgets for data and AI programs, including cost forecasting, expenditure tracking, variance analysis, and cost optimization recommendations.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI OP domain. OP-T-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-003 (LS, cosine: 0.484), RM-S-008 (RM, cosine: 0.477).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.1/10 (raw 0.406). Shared vocabulary: [operational]. DCWF-only terms [identify, influence, opportunity, order, planning, targets] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, analysis, budgets, cost, data, expenditure] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.884 (P=0.892, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 10-word DCWF element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.6%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Identify targets of opportunity in order to influence operational planning." and "Manage operational budgets for data and AI programs, including cost forecasting,". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.507 > STS 0.406 (gap +0.101). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [operational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.9%. Shared tokens: [operational]. DCWF-only: [identify, influence, opportunity, order, planning, targets]. WIDAI-only: [ai, analysis, budgets, cost, data, expenditure].

signals.detail: NLI contradiction 99.6% suggests semantic tension between the FDE and matched KSA. The competency domains may be adjacent but not functionally aligned.
